cases.name: vn-preference-vs-fresh-facts
cases.note: a standing-convention preference (4 days old, default importance) must win the top-k race against fresh same-topic status facts at the moment of ACTING — gauge for RECALL_PREFERENCE_BOOST; reproduces the real 2026-07-10 failure (Co-Authored-By trailer added even though the preference was saved)

cases.name: vn-stale-fact-superseded
cases.note: triple supersession: the two seeded preferences share (user, package_manager) with different objects and texts far apart in cosine — without the triple path recall returns BOTH; gauge for TRIPLE_SUPERSEDE (reproduces the stale pnpm→bun failure)
